S.FORM: NicolΟΓs Maduro I 1962 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci NicolΟΓs Maduro, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Venezuela anini i ci NicolΟΓs Maduro, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka ** fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u, ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u b~v…ôn…ô*o~u~u…ô…Ψa anini i Πi ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…°.
S.FORM: NicolΟΓs Maduro I 1962 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci NicolΟΓs Maduro, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Venezuela anini i ci NicolΟΓs Maduro, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka ** fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u, ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u b~v…ôn…ô*o~u~u…ô…Ψa anini i Πi ni Πo~u…Ψ*s ma…§~…°o~u~uro~u, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…°.
